description: Poster over a golden-hour photograph of a construction site. The image shows silhouetted construction workers in hard hats atop scaffolding and rebar against an orange-and-blue sunset sky with rebar columns and steel framework. Overlaid in a tall, narrow condensed white sans-serif font is the headline 'BUILDING THE WORKFORCE OF THE FUTURE' across the top, and at the bottom center in smaller caps 'APPRENTICESHIP.GOV'.
notable_text: BUILDING THE WORKFORCE OF THE FUTURE; APPRENTICESHIP.GOV
